title: [MTR4] Commonwealth Transport Group Resources for MTR
description: This resourcepack adds various trains with CTG (fictional company) liveries
body:
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4d819bdf68fe5620e13a002aae08ce3f84e3410_0.webp)

## Introduction

This resource pack adds Commonwealth Transport Group Trains (Fictional Company) for Minecraft MTR Mod

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway** Mod (Latest MTR4 Version)

## Terms & Disclaimer

This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

There may be differences in the manufacturer and license for each fleet.

**License Information**

Szandor's Stuff: Please refer to the link in the _details_ on the right of this page

Other Stuff: CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0

## Contents

_From Original MTRMod_
* S700
* London Underground S7
* BR 423

_Ultimate-USA-YT's Resources_
* Class 777
* Amfleet
* SC-44 Locomotive
* Metroliner Cab Car

_Szandorthe13th's Resources_
* Tyne and wear Metrocar
* VDL Citea Bus
* Custom sounds
* License for these stuff: [Click Here](https://github.com/szandorthe13th/Szandors-Stuff/blob/main/MTR%20Resource%20Pack%20Terms%20of%20Use.pdf)

_Vitor2005's Resources_
* Class 158

_Other Stuff (Soodari's fleet)_
* CTG Logo sign
* CTA 7000 Series
* SNG 
* Class 312000
* Class 730
* NDC DMU
* RE 460
* Eurofima Carriage
* ICM/ICMm
* Xplorer/Endeavour
* Hunter railcar
* DB Class 628
